hero.sub: From custom software to cybersecurity and quality assurance — Huntech digitizes all types of businesses without the need to hire an in-house team.
trust.label: Our Primary Focus
services.title: Full-Spectrum Tech Services
services.subtitle: From concept to deployment and beyond — we cover every layer of the modern technology stack.
svc1.title: IT Consulting
svc1.desc: Strategic technology roadmaps, digital transformation guidance and architecture reviews aligned to your goals.
svc2.title: Software Development
svc2.desc: Custom web, mobile and enterprise applications built with modern architectures, clean code and scalable design patterns.
svc3.title: QA Automation
svc3.desc: End-to-end test strategies — unit to E2E — integrated into CI/CD pipelines for continuous quality assurance.
svc4.title: Cybersecurity
svc4.desc: Penetration testing, vulnerability assessments and security architecture to protect your critical assets.
about.card.desc: We combine strategic vision with technical precision to transform how businesses operate and compete in the digital era.
about.title: Precision-Engineered Technology Since 2017
about.p1: Huntech was born from a simple belief: that great technology, built with care and expertise, changes everything. We work as embedded partners — not vendors — deeply invested in the outcomes we help create.
about.diff1.title: Senior-only teams
about.diff1.desc: Every project is led by senior engineers. No juniors learning on your dime.
about.diff2.title: Quality-first culture
about.diff2.desc: QA is baked into every sprint with automated gates and metrics.
about.diff3.title: Radical transparency
about.diff3.desc: Live dashboards, weekly demos — you always know exactly where things stand.
about.diff4.title: Security by design
about.diff4.desc: Every system we build follows security-first principles from architecture to deploy.
process.title: Our Proven Process
process.subtitle: A structured, transparent approach that consistently delivers results on time and within scope.
step1.title: Discovery
step1.desc: Deep dive into your goals, constraints and user needs before writing a single line of code.
step2.title: Planning
step2.desc: Architecture, sprint planning, tech selection and risk assessment for a solid foundation.
step3.title: Development
step3.desc: Iterative, test-driven development with weekly demos and shared dashboards.
step4.title: QA & Testing
step4.desc: Automated and manual quality gates, security scans and performance benchmarks.
step5.title: Delivery & Support
step5.desc: Zero-downtime deployments, knowledge transfer and SLA-backed maintenance.
stack.title: Built With Best-in-Class Tools
testi.title: What Our Clients Say
testi1.quote: Huntech transformed our entire QA process. Their automation framework cut our release cycle from 3 weeks to 4 days while actually improving quality. Incredible team.
testi2.quote: Their cybersecurity audit revealed 14 critical vulnerabilities we had no idea existed. They fixed everything and gave us an architecture we can actually trust.
testi3.quote: We hired Huntech as our CTO-as-a-Service. In 6 months they built a team, defined our stack and shipped our MVP. True strategic partners.
